title: Quintist Ores
description: New ores, armor and tools to improve gameplay and happiness.
body:
This mod adds an entirely new armor set with tools using a new ore called quintist. Quintist is roughly the same as diamond but slightly better in durability and overall protection. Also being added to the game is a new quintist dimension, however that isn't yet fully implemented and may be slightly buggy.


Patreon: [https://www.patreon.com/Swaix](https://www.patreon.com/Swaix)
Ko-Fi: [https://ko-fi.com/swaix](https://ko-fi.com/swaix)
